PreToolUse.description: Block commits of files containing secrets
PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE "(api[_-]?key|secret|password|token|credential)\s*[:=]\s*[\x27\"][^\x27\"]+" && echo "BLOCKED: File appears to contain hardcoded secrets. Use environment variables instead." && exit 1 || exit 0'

bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE "(rm -rf /|drop database|git push.*--force.*main|docker system prune -a)" && echo "BLOCKED: Destructive command detected. Please confirm with the user first." && exit 1 || exit 0'

PostToolUse.description: Warn on npm/pip install of unknown packages
PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r .command 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(npm install|pip install)" && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(--save-dev|-D|requirements.txt|package.json)"; then echo "NOTE: Package installed. Verify it is a trusted package and pin the version."; fi'
